hero.tagline: SUMMER IS A STATE OF MIND

lifestyle.title:
The essence of the
Mediterranean
lifestyle.description: Maison Sud is more than a clothing brand. It's an ode to youth, to evenings that stretch on, to warm sand underfoot and the effortless elegance of the French Riviera. Designed for those who live every moment intensely.

story.title:
Our
Story
story.p0: It all started with two teenagers, a dream too big for their age, and an obsession with the south of France.
story.p1: We had no money, no connections, no space. We just had a vision: to create a brand that truly speaks to young people. Not a brand made by adults trying to understand our generation. A brand born from within it.
story.p2: In the summer, we'd look at Saint-Tropez, Monaco, the Mediterranean — that world of freedom, sunshine, and the good life — and tell ourselves that this feeling, this state of mind, had to exist in the clothes we wear.
story.p3: Not in an office. Not in a meeting. In the minds of two kids who refused to wait until they were grown to start living.
story.p4: Today, every piece we create carries that energy. Summer as a state of mind. The Côte d'Azur as inspiration. Youth as a strength.
story.closing: Maison Sud is for those who don't wait.
